definition: a vendor is someone who sells things from a table or a cart
example: I bought my sunglasses from a street vendor in Florence.

definition: something that is ongoing is something that is still happening
example: The conversation about climate change is ongoing.

definition: if something relates to something else, there is a link between the two things
example: Juan relates 6 o’clock to dinner time.

definition: street food is simple food that is made and sold on the street
example: The street food sold in South Korea is delicious!

definition: cauliflower is a large round vegetable that is white with green leaves
example: Cauliflower is one of Niran’s favorite vegetables.

definition: tofu is soft food made from a type of bean
example: Kane eats tofu instead of meat.

definition: a dish is food that has been prepared for a meal
example: I ate a dish in Russia that reminded me of my grandmother’s soup.

definition: if you organize something, you put the parts into order
example: Jayne organizes her clothes by color and season.

definition: a sequence is the order that things are put in
example: Number the pages in sequence.

definition: something that is surprising is something that you did not think would happen
example: It’s surprising how many people applied for the job.

definition: tikka masala is a dish made with Indian spices, tomatoes, onions, cream, and meat
example: Meghan makes a spicy tikka masala.

definition: something that is spicy has a strong taste
example: This curry is tasty but also very spicy.

definition: an attack is when you begin working on something with lots of enthusiasm
example: Ian attacked the math problem with confidence.

definition: if you imagine something, you pretend it is happening and is real
example: Imagine being able to travel to every country in the world.

definition: if you serve food, you give it to people to eat
example: Help me serve the food before it gets cold.

definition: when you summarize something, you mention only the most important parts of it
example: I need to summarize this book in one page.

definition: something that is traditional is prepared in the same way it has been prepared for a long time
example: Kimchi is a traditional side dish in Korean food.

definition: if you attack someone, you try to hurt them
example: The soldiers were ready to attack.

definition: something that is buttery contains a lot of butter
example: The toast was hot and buttery.

definition: if you invent something, you make it for the first time
example: The person who invented cell phones must have been very clever.

definition: if you celebrate something, you do something special for that thing
example: We went to a restaurant to celebrate Janka’s birthday.

definition: if you miss someone or something, you feel sad because you are not with that person or thing
example: Saul will miss his family when he moves to Vietnam.

definition: an ingredient is one of the foods that you use to make a dish
example: The main ingredient in chocolate is cacao.

definition: a spice is part of a plant that is added to food for flavor
example: Sally uses mixed spices when she cooks.

definition: something that is creamy has a lot of cream in it or is smooth and thick like cream
example: Mix the eggs and butter until the mixture is creamy.

definition: a disaster is a bad accident that causes great damage
example: The dinner was a disaster because Verushka burned all the food.

definition: if you chat, you have a friendly conversation with someone
example: Liani and Fernanda like to chat to each other after work.

definition: if you chat away, you speak to someone for a long time
example: Paloma and her friends can chat away for hours on the phone.

definition: sushi is a type of Japanese food that contains rice and fish rolled together
example: Ronin’s wife eats sushi once a week.

definition: a diner is a person who eats a meal at a restaurant
example: There were so many diners at the restaurant that we had to wait 30 minutes for a table.

definition: something that is raw is not cooked
example: Leonardo thinks raw vegetables taste better than cooked vegetables.

definition: if something shocks you, it gives you a big surprise
example: I got a shock when I saw how expensive the bill was.

definition: the environment is the world of nature around us
example: Keeping the environment safe is a popular topic now.

definition: an allergy is when you get sick from something you eat, breathe, or touch
example: Sarah has a bad allergy to shellfish, so she can’t eat it.

definition: a place that is a pop-up is only open for a short time
example: The pop-up restaurant will only be there for one month.

definition: if you prepare food, you make it ready to eat
example: Thiago prepares his lunch every morning before he goes to work.

definition: an owner is the person who buys something that they will keep
example: Find the owner of this bag so we can give it back to them.

definition: a decision is when you choose what you should do
example: Ignacio made a decision to move to Laos.

definition: if you care about something or someone, you are very interested in it/them and feel that it is/they are important
example: I care about you very much.

definition: a vegetarian is a person who does not eat meat
example: My aunt is a vegetarian and doesn’t eat meat at all.

definition: a vegan is a person who does not eat anything from animals
example: As a vegan, Helga doesn’t even drink cow’s milk.

definition: sashimi is fish that has been prepared in a special way and is served without being cooked
example: Eliana tasted sashimi for the first time when she visited Japan last year.

definition: someone who is local comes from that place in an area or a town
example: Miona has lived in Brno her whole life and is local to the city.

definition: if you get food to go, you buy it from a restaurant and take it to eat somewhere else
example: Let’s get our food to go and eat in the park.

definition: someone who is allergic to something gets sick from that thing
example: Bertha is allergic to nuts so she can’t eat them.

definition: something that is homemade has been made in someone’s kitchen and not in a factory or restaurant
example: Jin’s homemade noodles taste better than the restaurant’s ones.

definition: if you cover something, you put something over it
example: Cover the pot and put it in the oven to stay warm.

definition: if you say something happens for at least an amount of time, it happens for no less than that time
example: Seiji plays online games for at least an hour every night.

definition: a cook is a person who prepares food for other people
example: The cook made a huge pot of pasta.

definition: something that is accurate is true and correct
example: The time on that clock is accurate.

definition: if you stir something, you move it around to mix it
example: Stir the tea until the sugar is mixed in.

definition: when you offer someone something, you give it to them
example: Dante offered me a ride to work this morning.

definition: a solution is an answer to a problem
example: There’s no simple solution to this problem.
